title: Art Exhibition: Silent Impressions
description: Simran Nigam trades brush for chisel in a solo show of hand-engraved wood, carving fantastical flora and fauna at Sublime Galleria
location: Sublime Galleria, UB City, Ashok Nagar

title: TPCC x Blr Design Center: The Community Festival
description: A three-day art-house festival where club members screen the films they love most, from Buñuel and Ray to Dreyer and Naruse

title: Nature Immersive Experience at NGMA Bengaluru
description: A guided morning of nature immersion at NGMA Bengaluru, tuning into the greenery and stories of the landscape around you
location: National Gallery of Modern Art, Bengaluru

title: Oslo: A Tail of Promise Film Screening and Chat with the Filmmakers
description: Screening of Oslo: A Tail of Promise, the true story of a Siberian husky and a woman's journey of belonging, with a filmmakers' chat to follow

title: Melchior Cheese Canvas Painting
description: A cheese canvas painting workshop where your palette is fine cheese from Melchior and your finished artwork is entirely edible, paired with Grover Zampa wine
